signals.reasoning: Cover the live TAO short immediately. The trade is now deeply underwater, retained none of peak P&L, and the urgent warning means there is no defensible reason to keep it on.
BTC is constructive, but the active veto keeps benchmark exposure in watch mode rather than action mode.
ETH has mild bullish tone, but not enough edge to justify fresh risk under the event brake.
SOL is constructive, but veto keeps it in watch mode rather than in the buy bucket.
VVV lacks enough clean edge to justify action here.
BLAST has a strong squeeze-style profile on paper, but the market quality is too poor to trust as a fresh long under veto conditions.
MET is too average on edge and quality to justify action.
BABY remains too catalyst-distorted and too thin to justify a fresh trade here.
FARTCOIN is too noisy and too crowded to trust as an actionable setup in this regime.
ARB remains a valid watch-only long because mechanics are constructive, but veto keeps it out of the buy bucket.
DASH also remains a decent watch-only long, but the event brake argues against taking new risk here.
